description: Standard: feature on school lunch debt

input.facts: School districts across the state are sending debt collectors after parents who owe money for unpaid school lunches. The average debt is $47. Some families have been threatened with referral to child protective services. A new state law would eliminate lunch debt and make school meals free, but it is stalled in committee.
The city's oldest fire station, built in 1892, will be demolished next month to make way for a mixed-use development.

description: European: lede for EU migration feature

input.facts: The Greek island of Lesbos, once the epicenter of Europe's 2015 migration crisis, has seen arrivals drop by 90% since the EU-Turkey deal. The island's economy, which briefly pivoted to serving NGOs and media, has collapsed again. Local businesses that profited from the crisis are now struggling. A new reception center built to EU standards sits mostly empty.
